candidate_definition_hints.text: Run GGUF models easily with a KoboldAI UI. One File. Zero Install.

KoboldCpp is an easy-to-use AI text-generation software for GGML and GGUF models, inspired by the original **KoboldAI**. It's a single self-contained distributable that builds off **llama.cpp** and adds many additional powerful features. [Download Releases Here](https://github.c…
